agents.name: DataValidator
agents.description: Ensures data consistency, validity, and integrity across all system operations. Specializes in input validation, format verification, and data quality assurance.

agents.name: ErrorHandler
agents.description: Manages system errors, exceptions, and edge cases. Provides graceful error handling, recovery strategies, and comprehensive error reporting.

agents.name: PerformanceMonitor
agents.description: Tracks and analyzes system performance metrics. Identifies bottlenecks, suggests optimizations, and ensures optimal resource utilization.

agents.name: SecurityAuditor
agents.description: Conducts security audits, vulnerability assessments, and compliance checks. Ensures system adherence to security best practices and standards.

agents.name: ConfigManager
agents.description: Manages system configurations, environment variables, and settings. Ensures consistency across deployments and maintains configuration documentation.
